name: Hawaiian Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Beat the eggs and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the flour, salt, and blend until smooth.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
5. Spoon the batter into two greased and floured 9 x 5 inch loaf pans.
6. Bake for 1 hour.
7. Remove from the pans and cool.
